Weather at the Dhams
🌞 Refresh Now
Auto-refreshes every 3 hours while page is open
Tap refresh to load live weather for all 4 dhams...
⚠️ High Altitude Advisory
🏭Kedarnath (3,583m) & Yamunotri (3,293m) — temperatures can drop below 0°C at night even in May
🌫️Helicopter operations are weather-dependent — morning flights are most reliable. Carry warm layers accessible in your carry-on
💧Gangotri sits at 3,048m — hydration is critical. ORS sachets and water every hour
💊Mom's lupus can flare with cold and altitude stress — monitor energy levels daily and rest when needed
☀️UV index is extreme at altitude — SPF 50 on face, neck and hands even on cloudy days
